name: Elemental Master
author: Poki
description: Elemental Master is a merge game where you harness the forces of nature to win epic battles! Start with basic elements like Earth and Fire, merge matching ones to unlock stronger powers, and boost your attack points. Combine elements to cast devastating spells and crush your enemies. Can you master all the elements and become the ultimate spellcaster? How to play Elemental Master? Click to generate new elements. Click and hold to move the elements. Who created Elemental Master? Elemental Master is created by CHEPERGame. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Elemental Master for free? You can play Elemental Master for free on Poki. Can I play Elemental Master on mobile devices and desktop? Elemental Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
